reviews.comment:
Los surtidores diesel están alejados y tardan en atender, si paga con tarjeta debe ir hasta la oficina a más de cien metros. Los baños muy limpios y prolijos.

(Translated by Google)
The diesel pumps are far apart and the service is slow; if you pay by card, you have to walk over 100 meters to the office. The restrooms are very clean and tidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdGJ5c2Z3EAE
